subject: [PATCH 4/4] devconfig: add some extra packages to the kdev tools

2026-05-19.patch_summary: This patch adds additional packages to the kdev tools installation process, specifically for Red Hat configurations. The new packages include strace, lsof, git, wireshark-cli, rsync, and time, which are useful for development and debugging tasks. This change is part of a larger effort to enhance the devconfig toolset.
